game_name: Police Quest: In Pursuit of the Death Angel

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Initial patrol duty with Sergeant Dooley; traffic enforcement and basic interactions teach proper sequence of actions (e.g., draw before firing)
Single-vehicle accident response; securing scenes and following chain-of-custody procedures
Strict procedure required: aim sidearm before firing or suffer self-inflicted injury; mishandling results in game over
Proper jail processing; must secure weapon in gun locker or suspect will steal and kill player
Introduces larger criminal network; vehicle search recovers evidence linking to murders
Player elevated to Narcotics Division with Detective Laura Watts; escalates investigation scope
Infiltrating Hotel Delphoria gambling ring; identity revelation and confrontation with primary antagonist
Direct conflict with Jesse Bains; identity exposure and backup coordination required for successful arrest

typical_relief_triggers: Conversations with allies (Officer Cobb, Detective Watts, Marie Wilkans)
Between-shift downtime at The Blue Room café
typical_tension_triggers: Procedure violation warnings and point penalties
Game over conditions from improper action sequencing
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Slow-burn procedural escalation; early gameplay emphasizes methodical police work with high stakes for procedural errors; mid-game introduces case complexity and emotional weight (Kathy's overdose); late-game culminates in dangerous undercover operation and violent confrontation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorials through patrol duty; emphasis on learning procedure-correct action sequences before stakes escalate; point penalties for mistakes educate player on proper police protocol
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Investigative complexity increases; multiple suspects and evidence threads; emotional stakes rise with Kathy Cobb's overdose; player must maintain procedural adherence while managing investigation expansion
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-stakes undercover infiltration; identity exposure risk; direct violent confrontation with primary antagonist; backup coordination required for successful resolution
notable_spikes: First armed encounter during early patrol
Weapon storage procedure at jail (instant failure state)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major scenario requires learning and executing correct action sequences in proper order. Failure at procedure gates results in point loss or immediate game over. Player must learn through trial and consequence.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Jail booking: must secure sidearm in locker before processing suspect, or suspect steals weapon and shoots player

notable_level_patterns.description: Single crime scene leads to expanding criminal network discovery. Each arrest or evidence recovery reveals larger conspiracy. Scope broadens from traffic duty to Narcotics Division focus.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Single-vehicle accident → stolen Cadillac → Taselli identity → drug ring → Death Angel investigation

notable_level_patterns.description: Personal stakes increase as investigation progresses. Player encounters familiar faces (Jack Cobb's daughter, high school friend Marie) whose fates tie to criminal activity. Drives motivation toward final confrontation.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Kathy Cobb's overdose and subsequent death; Marie's role as undercover informant

notable_level_patterns.description: Late-game transition into dangerous deception scenario. Player must maintain cover in criminal environment while coordinating backup response.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Hotel Delphoria infiltration; card game trust-building; penthouse confrontation with Bains
